# Karan Mahajan — Full Stack Web Developer

> Karan Mahajan is a Full Stack Web Developer specializing in Next.js, React,
> WordPress, and Drupal. He builds scalable CMS-driven and headless web
> architectures. This site (world.karanmahajan.ca) is an interactive, walkable
> 3D portfolio. His detailed, text-based portfolio lives at https://karanmahajan.ca.

## About

- Name: Karan Mahajan
- Role: Full Stack Web Developer
- Current employer: Skylar Media Group (Feb 2025 – Present)
- Education: University of Windsor
- Status: Open to full-time roles, freelance projects, and collaborations
- Primary portfolio (detailed): https://karanmahajan.ca
- Interactive 3D portfolio: https://world.karanmahajan.ca
- Email: karanmahajan321@gmail.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/karan-mahajan/
- GitHub: https://github.com/karan-mahajan

## Skills

- Frontend: Next.js, React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, JavaScript, HTML, CSS, Material UI, Bootstrap
- CMS: WordPress, Drupal, Wix, ExpressionEngine (including headless setups)
- Backend & Databases: Node.js, Django, Python, Java, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, MySQL
- DevOps & Tools: AWS, Jenkins, Git, Pantheon, Jira, Figma
- Other: GraphQL, REST APIs, Stripe, WooCommerce, JWT/OAuth, WCAG accessibility

## Experience

- Full Stack Web Developer, Skylar Media Group (Feb 2025 – Present): Scalable CMS-driven and headless architectures across WordPress, Drupal, Next.js, React.
- Programming Research Assistant, University of Windsor (May 2024 – Aug 2024): Frontend redesign of a client platform, dynamic UI components, CMS architecture management.
- Software Engineer, Recro (Jul 2022 – Mar 2023): Reusable React component library with cross-framework support and accessibility standards.
- Software Craftsperson, Launch Ventures (Oct 2021 – Jul 2022): Responsive PWAs in React/Next.js; dashboards and Node.js APIs over MongoDB.
- Member of Technical Staff, MetricStream (Jul 2019 – Oct 2021): MySQL optimization, JavaScript frontend, Java backend, AWS + Jenkins pipelines.

## Selected projects

- Alectra Utilities (https://alectrautilities.com): Enterprise Drupal CMS for an Ontario utility — complex content workflows, scheduled transitions, Pantheon deployments. Tech: Drupal, PHP, Pantheon, Lando.
- RPRA Website (https://rpra.ca): Full QA audit and development for Ontario's Resource Productivity and Recovery Authority — custom tooling, plugin management, Git deployment pipelines. Tech: WordPress, PHP, Git, Pantheon.
- Interstone: WooCommerce store with WebP image compression, REST API integrations, Wordfence security. Tech: WordPress, WooCommerce, REST API, PHP.
- findabl: Next.js app with Apollo GraphQL, dynamic employee profiles, CSP enforcement, SSR optimizations. Tech: Next.js, React, GraphQL, Apollo.
- Trimark Windows: ExpressionEngine project with an isolated landing-page system and PHP form handlers using Mailjet and Postmark. Tech: ExpressionEngine, PHP, Mailjet.
